meaning: adj.得不到休息的,不平静的,不安宁的
examples: They all felt restless and unsettled.
My father seemed very restless and excited.
By 1982, she was restless and needed a new impetus for her talent.
This mode is best sampled on the fine anthology Eager Hands and Restless Feet.
According to the agency, the same risk-benefit analysis does not hold true for restless-leg syndrome.
